column6: The study aims to evaluate how well participants comprehend different types of explanations generated by explainable   AI (XAI) systems. During the study, you will be presented with the following:         Global SHAP explanations showing overall model behavior through three different visualization       types           Local SHAP explanations for specific predictions through two different explanation formats          After reviewing this information, you will be asked to evaluate your understanding, satisfaction, and trust   regarding the provided explanations, as well as your preferences among different explanation formats. The anticipated time commitment for participating in this study is approximately 7-10 minutes. Your involvement is   instrumental in enriching our understanding of how individuals perceive and interact with different XAI explanation   methods. Your contribution to this research is entirely voluntary, and we hold your privacy and confidentiality in the   highest regard. The information you provide will be used exclusively for research purposes. The study can be   terminated at any point if you do not wish to continue without consequences. Information and Declaration of Consent on Data Protection In scientific studies, personal data about you will be collected. The storage, evaluation, and transfer of this   study-related data are carried out in accordance with legal regulations and requires the following voluntary consent   prior to participation in the study:         I agree that data collected in the course of this study may be recorded on questionnaires and       electronic data       carriers and processed without mentioning my name.           Furthermore, I agree that an authorized person (e.g.: the client, the university), who is       obligated to secrecy,       may inspect my collected personal data, as far as this is necessary for the review of the project. For this       measure,       I release the researcher from professional secrecy.           I understand that I have the right to obtain information (including a free copy) about the       personal data       concerning me and to request its correction and deletion.     If you have any further questions, please contact me at fkaljanac1@etf.unsa.ba After this introductory part, it should take approximately 7-10 minutes to complete the questionnaire. Thank you   for your time and contribution to advancing XAI research! Thank you for your time!

column14: The FB Prophet model was utilized to forecast the concentration of the PM10 particle at the Bjelave location. The prediction was based on historical data of the target pollutant (PM10) and a set of additional regressors, including meteorological parameters (wind speed, wind direction, precipitation, pressure, temperature, humidity, visibility, and cloudiness) and concentrations of other pollutants (SO2 and NO2). The following visualizations present the time series data for these input variables spanning from 2018 to 2023.
column16: The results of the multivariate prediction for 30 days ahead (with dates shown on the plot) for our target variable are presented below. The same plot displays the actual values (blue color) and our model's predictions (orange color), along with the PM10 particle concentration categorization based on Air Quality Index (AQI) standards for health assessment.
column18: In a beeswarm plot, each SHAP value, representing the impact of a specific feature on a particular prediction, appears as a point whose position is determined by reading from the x-axis. This position indicates whether the given feature value decreases or increases the prediction, while the blue or red color determines whether the feature values that influence the prediction are low or high.
